> child_process["exec"](command, {maxBuffer: maxBuffer}, function(error, stdout, stderr) { if (error) { reject(error); } else { if ((opts && opts["encoding"])) { resolve(stdout["toString"](opts["encoding"])); } else { resolve(stdout); } } });
